title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: CHILDREN'S CENTER OREGON CITY CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site therapy and off-site therapy/counseling referrals, advocacy services, community trainings, and prevention education. 1713 Penn Lane Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 suspected to be victims of abuse Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 655-7725 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 655-7725 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake. Referrals can be made by law enforcement agencies, child protective workers, parents, teachers, doctors, or others concerned for the welfare of a child FEES: None, donations accepted DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHILDREN'S CENTER OREGON CITY
